meaning: adj.有效的,被实施的,给人深刻印象,有生力量
examples: All these techniques are equally effective.
The world desperately needs an effective WTO.
Humour is a more effective defence than violence.
The studies show that Zyvox was as well-tolerated and effective as vancomycin, a common hospital antibiotic.
This Convention aims to provide adequate and effective protection of the rights of authors and artists.
